menu.title: Choose Your Catch
menu.empty: No fish found for this location.
hud.unavailable: {{fish}} is not currently available here; using normal fishing.
hud.unavailable-disabled: {{fish}} isn't available here; target fishing disabled.
config.openMenuKey.name: Open target fish menu
config.openMenuKey.tooltip: Opens the menu to choose a fish target.
config.allowAllFish.name: Allow all fish
config.allowAllFish.tooltip: Show and allow all known fish instead of only fish available at the current location.
config.defaultQuality.name: Default quality
config.defaultQuality.tooltip: Quality applied when a fish is selected. Vanilla keeps vanilla quality behavior.
config.showOnlyFish.name: Show only fish
config.showOnlyFish.tooltip: Filter the menu to only show actual fish items, hiding junk, seaweed, and other non-fish catches.
config.respectSpawningRules.name: Respect spawning rules
config.respectSpawningRules.tooltip: Only allow selecting and catching fish that are available under the current time, weather, and season.
hud.stop-fishing: Stop fishing before opening Choose Your Catch.
menu.sort.name: Name (A-Z)
menu.empty.uncaught: No uncaught fish are available in this list.
